system.description: Hushed and terrified whispers about this foul object can be heard from time to time. The owner of the Cup need only kill a victim, drain their blood into the Cup, and then drink from the Cup. They gain 2d6 years of life in this process. Every time they use the Cup, apply a -1 penalty to the roll. Once a result of zero occurs, the Cup must be used daily to sustain the owner's life.
